channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Philippine Airlines Restarts Flights to Riyadh
item.description: Philippine Airlines (PAL) has announced the resumption of its flights to Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, effective April 9, 2026. This move signifies a positive development in the airline's operations and provi...

item.title: Essex Teenager Plotted Terror Attack, Entrapped by MI5
item.description: A 21-year-old man from Great Notley, Essex, has been accused of attempting to purchase a gun for a terrorist attack, a court heard this week. Alfie Coleman, who denies preparing terrorist acts, was re...

item.title: Senate blue ribbon hearing delayed as Chavit affidavit and more signatures on report are needed
item.description: The Senate Blue Ribbon Committee hearing, initially set for April 14, has been deferred as crucial elements are still pending. Among these is the affidavit of former Philippine official Chavit Singson...

item.title: APC Faces Internal Leadership Dispute Over Chairmanship
item.description: Today, wahala don burst for APC as new leadership crisis don show face. Alhaja Hafsatu Danladi don declare herself as chairperson of one faction inside the ruling party, claiming say na she be the cor...

item.title: Puducherry Elections 2026: Robot ‘Nila’ Welcomes Voters in a Crucial NDA-Congress Contest
item.description: Voting for the Puducherry 2026 assembly elections began at 7 am, with an interesting feature at a polling booth in the VOC Government School. Voters were greeted by 'Nila,' a robot designed to welcome...

item.title: RBI Maintains Repo Rate and Projects 6.9% Economic Growth for 2026
item.description: Mumbai: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has decided to keep the repo rate steady at 5.25% for the second consecutive meeting, reflecting a cautious and balanced approach to monetary policy. Governor S...

item.title: BER report urges rapid economic reforms to strengthen SA growth under GNU
item.description: A recent report from the Bureau for Economic Research (BER), authored by Prof Johan Fourie and Claire Bisseker, emphasises that accelerating economic reforms is essential to boost South Africa's growt...

item.title: Man with links to Israeli organized crime pleads guilty in L.A. high-stakes poker ring case
item.description: Yevgeni Gershman, a 50-year-old resident of Woodland Hills with prior criminal convictions in Israel, has agreed to plead guilty to four federal charges for his role in an illegal high-stakes poker ri...

item.title: Driver Faces Impaired Charge After Vehicle Lands in Ditch on Highway 17
item.description: A man has been charged with impaired driving after his vehicle ended up in a ditch on Highway 17. Ontario Provincial Police (OPP) responded to the scene in the early hours of April 8, 2026, where they...

item.title: Nairobi United's Kizza Celebrates Goal, Honors Victor Wanyama
item.description: Nairobi United left back Mustafa Kizza has been causing quite a buzz after dedicating his stunning wondergoal against Shabana to Harambee Stars legend, Victor Wanyama. The Ugandan player, who's been m...

item.title: Kenya Faces Fuel Price Concerns Amidst Diverse News Developments
item.description: Recent Kenyan news covers a wide range of topics, including rising fuel prices, investigations into police conduct, and ongoing political and economic developments. Reports indicate growing concerns a...

item.title: Maple Leafs goalie Anthony Stolarz suffers lower-body injury in early exit against Capitals
item.description: Toronto Maple Leafs goaltender Anthony Stolarz left Wednesday night’s matchup against the Washington Capitals early in the first period after sustaining a lower-body injury. The 32-year-old netminder ...

item.title: Actor Ashley Hamilton in stable condition following reported overdose amid ongoing cancer battle
item.description: Actor and musician Ashley Hamilton, son of George Hamilton and Alana Stewart, has been hospitalised in Los Angeles following what sources describe as an apparent overdose. The 51-year-old, previously ...

item.title: ICE Shooting Incident in Central California: Undocumented Immigrant Shot During Traffic Stop
item.description: In Central California, ICE agents shot and wounded Carlos Ivan Mendoza Hernandez, a 36-year-old undocumented immigrant, during a traffic stop. The shooting took place near Patterson, California, when ...

item.title: North Korea tests weapons over a span of three days, reports KCNA
item.description: North Korea has reportedly conducted a series of weapons tests over the past three days, as per a report from its state-run news agency, KCNA. The tests come amid ongoing tensions in the region, parti...

item.title: Tips for purchasing theatre tickets at lower prices and selecting the ideal seats
item.description: The article provides practical guidance for theatre-goers looking to save money while attending performances. It outlines various strategies for purchasing tickets more affordably, such as booking in ...

item.title: Suspicious oil trades raise questions of insider information ahead of Trump’s Iran ceasefire decision
item.description: A fresh wave of suspicion surrounds the Trump administration after US$950 million (A$1.4 billion) was reportedly bet on oil prices falling just hours before the former president announced a ceasefire ...

item.title: Lessons from Global University Leaders on Crisis Management
item.description: Dis article dey look how leaders for American-style international universities dey manage crises for different countries. Di writer, wey don lead universities for Africa, North America, and Europe, sh...

item.title: Man sentenced to 11 years for causing gas explosion that destroyed multiple homes
item.description: Paul Solway, aged 58, has been sentenced to 11 years in prison after deliberately causing a gas explosion at his partner Joanne Waterfall’s home in Alvaston, Derby. The incident occurred on 10 June la...

item.title: Assembly elections 2026 underway in Kerala, Assam, and Puducherry
item.description: The 2026 Assembly elections have commenced today in Kerala, Assam, and Puducherry, with polling scheduled from 7 am to 6 pm. In Kerala, 2.71 crore voters will choose among 883 candidates for the 140-s...
